# lightdash_oauth_application (Resource)

Manages an OAuth 2.0 application (client) at the organization level. These are the same clients shown under **Organization settings → OAuth applications** in the Lightdash UI.

Requires an organization admin personal access token. The `client_secret` is returned only once at creation and is not refreshed on read. Import does not populate `client_secret`; create a new application to rotate credentials.

`redirect_uris` is a full replacement list on update (the Lightdash API PATCH replaces the entire array).

`deletion_protection` is required. When set to `true`, Terraform will not destroy the resource. Imported resources default to `deletion_protection = true`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_name` (String) The display name of the OAuth application.
- `deletion_protection` (Boolean) When set to `true`, prevents the destruction of the OAuth application resource by Terraform.
- `organization_uuid` (String) The UUID of the Lightdash organization. Must match the organization for the configured API token.
- `redirect_uris` (Set of String) Allowed OAuth redirect URIs. Updates replace the entire list in Lightdash.

### Read-Only

- `client_id` (String) The OAuth client ID.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) The OAuth client secret. Returned only at creation; not refreshed on read.
- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the client was created.
- `created_by_user_uuid` (String) UUID of the user who created the client, if known.
- `id` (String) The resource identifier. It is computed as `organizations/<organization_uuid>/oauth_applications/<client_id>`.
- `scopes` (List of String) OAuth scopes stored on the client.
